contraceptive_vulnerability.label: Current contraceptive nonuse despite intercourse in the 3 months before interview
contraceptive_vulnerability.positive_definition: CONSTAT1 code 42; denominator is the NSFG analytic female respondent population, interpreted as a current vulnerability proxy rather than an incident pregnancy outcome
contraceptive_vulnerability.interpretation: A current contraceptive vulnerability proxy, not a pregnancy outcome.

fertility_service_or_loss_help.label: Ever received medical help to become pregnant or to prevent miscarriage
fertility_service_or_loss_help.positive_definition: HLPPRG code 1 or HLPMC code 1, indicating ever receiving medical help to become pregnant or to prevent miscarriage
fertility_service_or_loss_help.interpretation: A fertility-care and pregnancy-loss-care utilization endpoint.

unintended_mistimed_pregnancy_history.label: Any pregnancy recorded as too soon, mistimed, or unwanted
unintended_mistimed_pregnancy_history.positive_definition: Among respondents with pregnancy records, any NEWWANTR code 3/4/6, WANTRESP code 3/5, WANTPART code 3/5, TIMINGOK code 3, or WANTBOLD code 5
unintended_mistimed_pregnancy_history.interpretation: A lifetime pregnancy-intention history proxy among respondents with pregnancy records.

adverse_pregnancy_history_proxy.label: Any low-birthweight live birth or stillbirth history
adverse_pregnancy_history_proxy.positive_definition: Among respondents with pregnancy records, any public-use low-birthweight live birth indicator (LBW1 code 1) or stillbirth outcome (OUTCOME code 3)
adverse_pregnancy_history_proxy.interpretation: A public-use adverse pregnancy-history proxy, not a clinical diagnosis.

impaired_fecundity_status.label: Fecundity limitation or infertility status
impaired_fecundity_status.positive_definition: FECUND code 2-5 or INFERT code 1-2, using public-use NSFG fecundity or infertility recodes and excluding FECUND code 1 contraceptive sterilization
impaired_fecundity_status.interpretation: A broad public-use fecundity-limitation or infertility proxy that excludes contraceptive sterilization and is not a clinical infertility diagnosis.
